content.speakerText: I should head out soon—this was such a great night.
content.speakerTextCn: 我该走了，今晚聊得太开心了。
expectedAnswers: Same here! Have a safe trip home 😊
I loved tonight too—let’s do this again soon!
Thanks for being such a great company. Drive safely and text me when you get home!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了共鸣和关心
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否使用了口语化、温暖的语气
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少一个场景关键词如 'safe trip', 'text', 'again soon'

content.speakerText: It’s getting late—I had such a wonderful time with you.
content.speakerTextCn: 时间不早了，我和你度过了非常美好的时光。
expectedAnswers: Same! I’m already looking forward to next time. Take care!
Thank you so much—tonight was perfect. Don’t forget to send me a photo tomorrow!
I’m so glad we got to spend this time together. Safe travels and talk soon!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了情感并传递温暖
语言准确性：是否避免生硬或语法错误表达
表达自然度：是否使用了符合英语母语者习惯的口语结构
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少一个情感关键词如 'wonderful time', 'look forward', 'safe travels'

content.speakerText: I should go—this has been such a lovely evening.
content.speakerTextCn: 我该走了，今晚真是一段美好的时光。
expectedAnswers: It really has! I’ll miss you already—text me when you’re home 😊
Same here! You made the night so special. Take care and see you soon!
Thank you for being here. I’m already planning our next coffee date!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了感谢、共鸣与未来期待
语言准确性：是否正确使用时态、介词和短语搭配
表达自然度：是否避免机械重复，体现个性化回应
关键词覆盖：是否包含至少一个情感表达词如 'lovely evening', 'special', 'next time'
